title: video-script
description: Structured script consumed by the video-production pipeline. One object per scene/segment.

global_visual_style.description: ONE style string reused by every segment for cohesion, e.g. 'clean dark UI, cyan accent, bold sans headlines, subtle motion'

narration_text.description: Spoken VO for this segment. Keep the total spoken time under 60s.

visual_description.description: What is on screen: text, b-roll, charts, avatar.
